scripts.lint: bash -c 'if [ -x node_modules/.bin/eslint ]; then eslint . --max-warnings=0; else bash -n hooks/*.sh; echo "ESLint not installed; shell hooks linted."; fi'
scripts.format:check: bash -c 'if [ -x node_modules/.bin/prettier ]; then prettier . --check; else echo "Prettier not installed; format check skipped."; fi'
scripts.format: bash -c 'if [ -x node_modules/.bin/prettier ]; then prettier . --write; else echo "Prettier not installed; format skipped."; fi'
scripts.test: bash -c 'if [ -x node_modules/.bin/vitest ]; then vitest run --passWithNoTests; else echo "Vitest not installed; tests skipped."; fi'
scripts.design:import: bash -c 'if [ -f tools/figma-import/src/cli.ts ]; then tsx tools/figma-import/src/cli.ts examples/figma-input.button.json; else echo "Design import tool not present; skipped."; fi'
scripts.design:map: bash -c 'if [ -f tools/component-mapper/src/cli.ts ]; then tsx tools/component-mapper/src/cli.ts; else echo "Component mapper not present; skipped."; fi'
scripts.compliance:review: bash -c 'if [ -f tools/compliance-agent/src/cli.ts ]; then tsx tools/compliance-agent/src/cli.ts; else echo "Compliance review tool not present; skipped."; fi'
scripts.commit:check: bash -c 'msg=${1:-}; if [ -z "$msg" ]; then echo "Usage: pnpm commit:check .git/COMMIT_EDITMSG" >&2; exit 1; fi; bash hooks/commit-msg.sh "$msg"' --
